positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    italian != palace_of_flies).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    translated_from(neapolitan_chronicles,italian)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    nvp != italian).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    nvp != palace_of_flies).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    neapolitan_chronicles != italian).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    neapolitan_chronicles != palace_of_flies).

cnf(u19,negated_conjecture,
    ~translated_from(palace_of_flies,italian)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    nvp != neapolitan_chronicles).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define published_by(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define in_english(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
